name: oac-bnotk-xnp
description: Local XNP gate for notary-side workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Check local XNP readiness before notary-side filings.
interface.longDescription: Local-only XNP gate for notarial workplace readiness, current local authentication and Amtstaetigkeitskontext attestation, XNotar/register-package handoff readiness, API-key presence attestation and evidence flow while keeping XNP credentials out of SaaS and Git.
defaultPrompt: Check XNP readiness for a notary-side register workflow.
Create a local XNP authentication gate plan.
Validate XNotar handoff readiness without credential values.
